/usr/bin/ar qc libcommon_math.a CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/aabox2d.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/box2d.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/line_segment2d.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/linear_interpolation.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/math_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/polygon2d.cc.o CMakeFiles/common_math.dir/vec2d.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcommon_math.a
